dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: Starlink 17-16 Launches at 14:37 UTC — 603rd Booster Landing; ARK Invest: SpaceX IPO $1.75T 'Not the Ceiling'
heroSubtitle: 8,757 days of reusability milestones — Starlink 17-16 (B1088 15th flight, 25 sats, OCISLY) launched Apr 26 at 14:37 UTC, 603rd booster recovery, 51st orbital launch of 2026; ARK Invest Apr 26: $1.75T IPO target not the ceiling, $20B+ 2026 Starlink revenue, 165 missions in 2025 (~85% of global orbital launches); Bloomberg Apr 24 moat analysis; Cursor AI $60B option (Apr 23); Golden Dome consortium (Apr 22); Starship IFT-12 V3 targeting May 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Inside GNSS, Northrop Grumman, Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, ARK Invest, Quilty Space, RocketLaunch.org
